message:
fix: use safeJson helper in enterprise API fetches (Fixes #9831) (#9850)

Two fixes flagged by Copilot on PR #9814:

1. Switch 19 enterprise compliance card fetchers from response.json()
   to safeJson() so HTML responses (e.g. Netlify SPA fallback returning
   index.html) produce a descriptive error instead of a cryptic
   "Unexpected token '<'" parse error. safeJson() was added in #9797
   as defense-in-depth but had no callers in web/src until now.

2. Fix MSW catch-all regex in handlers.ts. MSW applies regex matchers
   to the full request URL (including protocol + host), so the
   anchored pattern /^\/api\// never matched anything. Drop the anchor
   so the regex matches '/api/' anywhere in the URL.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
